---
title: ""
---

```{=html}
<div class="about-section">
  <div class="about-text">
    <h1 class="about-name">Eli Cheam Shapiro</h1>
    <p class="about-title">Analyst, Penn Wharton Budget Model</p>
    <p class="about-subtitle">MRes in Economics · Sciences Po Paris</p>

    <p class="about-bio">
      I am an economist and data analyst at the
      <a href="https://budgetmodel.wharton.upenn.edu/" target="_blank">Penn Wharton Budget Model</a>,
      where I work on fiscal policy analysis and economic modeling.
      My work sits at the intersection of empirical economics, public finance, and data science.
    </p>

    <p class="about-bio">
      Prior to PWBM, I worked as a Predoctoral Research Assistant at Trinity College Dublin,
      where I built OCR and webscraping pipelines to digitize large-scale historical economic datasets
      from the Russian Empire and British Parliament. I hold a Master of Research in Economics from
      Sciences Po Paris (GPA: 4.0) and a BA in Economics from Bard College (GPA: 3.8).
    </p>

    <p class="about-bio">
      My research interests span macroeconomics, public finance, economic history, and
      computational methods. I am proficient in R, Python, STATA, and Julia.
    </p>

    <div class="about-links">
      <a href="mailto:elicheamshapiro@gmail.com" class="about-link">
        <i class="bi bi-envelope-fill"></i> elicheamshapiro@gmail.com
      </a>
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/elicheamshapiro" target="_blank" class="about-link">
        <i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn
      </a>
      <a href="cv.qmd" class="about-link">
        <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-person-fill"></i> CV
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="about-photo">
    <img src="assets/photo.jpg" alt="Eli Cheam Shapiro" class="profile-photo"/>
  </div>
</div>
```
